---
title: "UIAO_119 ‚Äî CLI `tenant promote-preview` (wave 2 partial)"
subtitle: "First consumer surface for `tenancy.environment.prod-promote`"
date: "2026-04-26"
date-format: "MMMM D, YYYY"
description: "Closes part of action 119.3 (b) wave 2 from the ¬ß4.4 assessment by shipping a CLI consumer for the `tenancy.environment.prod-promote` feature flag. The remaining wave 2 item (`auditor-api.cql.experimental-ops`) still awaits experimental CQL operators."
---

## Plan metadata

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| Program | UIAO_127 (Project Plans) |
| Closes | Wave 2 ‚Äî CLI half of action 119.3 (b) from the [¬ß4.4 assessment](2026-04-26-ha-perf-recovery-tenancy-assessment.qmd) |
| Target spec | UIAO_119 Tenancy Strategy ‚Äî CLI promotion preview |
| Plan version | 1.0 (first delivery) |
| Builds on | [v2 feature flags](2026-04-26-uiao_119-v2-feature-flags.qmd), [migration sandbox](2026-04-26-uiao_119-migration-sandbox.qmd), [canary rollout runbook](../ops-runbook/2026-04-26-uiao_119-canary-rollout.qmd) |

## What shipped

`uiao tenant promote-preview` ‚Äî new CLI subcommand under a new `tenant` sub-app. Renders the substrate-behavior diff for promoting a tenant from one environment to another, gated by the existing `tenancy.environment.prod-promote` feature flag.

```
$ uiao tenant promote-preview \
    --tenant-id acme-canary \
    --tenant-class canary \
    --from dev \
    --to stage
promote-preview acme-canary: dev ‚Üí stage
  tenant_class: canary
  actor:        cli
+1 flags newly enabled
  + epl.action.block.enabled
```

The runner under the hood is the v2 [`MigrationSandbox`](2026-04-26-uiao_119-migration-sandbox.qmd) configured to enumerate the set of feature flags that evaluate to `True` for each context. The diff between "before" and "after" enabled-sets is exactly the operator-visible behavior change.

### Surfaces

- **`src/uiao/cli/tenant.py`** ‚Äî new sub-app. `promote-preview` subcommand with options:
  - `--tenant-id` (required), `--from`, `--to` (required).
  - `--tenant-class` (default `standard`), `--actor` (default `cli`).
  - `--output human|json` (default `human`).
  - `--allow-no-change` ‚Äî by default, an empty diff exits 1 to flag operator typos like `--from prod --to prod`; the flag opts out.
- **`src/uiao/cli/app.py`** ‚Äî registers `tenant_app` next to the other sub-apps.

### Permission gate

The subcommand consults `tenancy.environment.prod-promote` against the **operator's** context (not the tenant being previewed). The default canon enables it in `dev` / `stage` for `internal` actors. Denials exit 2 with a `Permission denied` message that names the flag ‚Äî easy to wire into a CI pre-commit gate.

```yaml
# Default canon (already in src/uiao/canon/feature-flags.yaml):
- name: tenancy.environment.prod-promote
  environments: [dev, stage]
  tenant_classes: [internal]
```

## Public API delta

| Symbol | Before | After |
|---|---|---|
| `cli.tenant` module | did not exist | new typer sub-app |
| `cli.tenant.tenant_app` | ‚Äî | new `Typer` |
| `cli.tenant.promote_preview` | ‚Äî | new subcommand |
| `cli.tenant.PROD_PROMOTE_FLAG` | ‚Äî | constant |
| `cli.app` | 13 sub-apps | 14 sub-apps (`tenant` registered) |

Pure addition. No existing CLI surface is altered.

## Test coverage: 7 new

| Test class | Tests | What they assert |
|---|---|---|
| `TestPromotePreviewPermissions` | 3 | Dev actor allowed; prod actor denied (exit 2); empty canon denies |
| `TestPromotePreviewDiff` | 4 | dev‚Üístage no-op exits 1 by default; `--allow-no-change` exits 0; dev‚Üíprod surfaces newly-enabled regulated-only flag; `--output json` parses cleanly |

7 pass. **93 pass** across the wider UIAO_119 + sandbox + tenancy + flag-system surface. No regressions.

## Action items closed

| # | Action | Status |
|---|---|---|
| 119.3 (b) wave 2 ‚Äî CLI half | Wire `tenancy.environment.prod-promote` once the consumer surface ships | ‚úÖ shipped this PR |

## Action items still open

| # | Action | Owner | Due |
|---|---|---|---|
| 119.3 (b) wave 2 ‚Äî CQL half | Wire `auditor-api.cql.experimental-ops` once CQL gains experimental operators (subqueries, joins, regex `~`). Until those exist there is nothing to gate; the flag is pre-positioned. | Substrate maintainer | After CQL v2 ops land |

## Roll-up to substrate-status

| Row | From | To |
|---|---|---|
| UIAO_119 | üü° working ‚Äî v1 + v2 + tagging + check-points + API filter + sandbox + ops runbook + plane flags shipped | üü° working ‚Äî **+ CLI tenant promote-preview ‚úÖ shipped 2026-04-26** ([impl record](2026-04-26-uiao_119-cli-tenant-promote.qmd)); only the CQL half of wave 2 stays open (gated on CQL gaining experimental operators) |

## References

- UIAO_119 v2 feature-flag system ‚Äî [`2026-04-26-uiao_119-v2-feature-flags.qmd`](2026-04-26-uiao_119-v2-feature-flags.qmd) (the canon flag this CLI consumes)
- UIAO_119 migration sandbox ‚Äî [`2026-04-26-uiao_119-migration-sandbox.qmd`](2026-04-26-uiao_119-migration-sandbox.qmd) (the diff engine)
- UIAO_119 canary rollout runbook ‚Äî [`../ops-runbook/2026-04-26-uiao_119-canary-rollout.qmd`](../ops-runbook/2026-04-26-uiao_119-canary-rollout.qmd) (Step 2+ verification now has a one-line CLI shorthand)
- ¬ß4.4 assessment ‚Äî [`2026-04-26-ha-perf-recovery-tenancy-assessment.qmd`](2026-04-26-ha-perf-recovery-tenancy-assessment.qmd)
